untranslatable_reason: Rising window pattern requires gap detection (open > prev_high) which is partially expressible, but the weak support zone concept and precise gap-fill mechanics cannot be fully encoded with available indicators. Success rates, volume trends, and throwback/pullback percentages are marked AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be translated.
translation_notes: Interpreted Rising Window as: (1) white/bullish candlestick (close > open), (2) price gap up at open (open > prev_high), (3) exit on reversal (close < open next bar). Used 5.78% stop loss from source data. Target regime set to TRENDING_DOWN per signal specification. Several pattern-specific parameters remain untranslatable due to AUTHOR_SILENT designation and lack of gap-specific indicators.
